title: AARP - 211info
text: AARP OREGON AARP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Advocacy organization for older adults that provides education, information, and volunteer opportunities. Advocates for affordable health care, employment and income security, and protection from financial abuse. 1455 SW Broadway Suite 1490 Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: Unrestricted, but targeted towards age 50 and older Hours: National office: Monday-Friday 4am-8pm Oregon office: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email - (866) 554-5360 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Toll-free (866) 554-5360 Oregon Office Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: $20 annual membership fee. Discounts for automatic renewal or paying ahead for multiple years. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Senior Advocacy Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - AARP HELPLINE INFORMATION SERVICES - AARP CAREGIVING COMMUNITY RESOURCES LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - FRAUD WATCH NETWORK MUTUAL SUPPORT - CONNECTING PUBLIC SAFETY - AARP DRIVER SAFETY PROGRAM TAX ORGANIZATIONS AND SERVICES - TAX AIDE SITES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. AARP OREGON
